Description: Write per-day cluster manifests so Epic 2 results are inspectable before final album selection exists.

Stories.StoryDescription: Define a structured JSON manifest schema containing cluster IDs, member filenames, representatives, burst memberships, timestamps, and similarity metrics.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has a stable per-day cluster manifest schema for inspection and downstream use.

Stories.StoryName: Persist manifests next to day photos
Stories.StoryDescription: Write one cluster_manifest.json file into each dayXX folder after clustering completes.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each clustered day produces a JSON manifest next to its accepted photos.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add accepted-photo, burst-group, final-cluster, and singleton counts to the per-day manifest summary.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Each manifest contains a compact human-readable summary section.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add tests covering manifest shape, ordering, representative data, and rerun stability.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests verify manifest shape, deterministic ordering, and safe rerun behavior.
